chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5230 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 26.02.2025 Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel, petitioner is aggrieved of show cause notice, however, states that the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and further that in the interim period no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
